info.name: Decorated Chocolate Truffle Cake
info.description: Delight in our Decorated Chocolate Truffle Cake—rich, moist chocolate layers wrapped in luscious truffle ganache and beautifully adorned with elegant decorations. Perfect for birthdays, anniversaries, or any special occasion, it’s a treat that looks as good as it tastes!

info.name: Black Forest Delicacy Cake
info.description: Indulge in the timeless charm of our Black Forest Delicacy Cake. This luxurious cake features layers of rich chocolate sponge, light whipped cream, and sweet cherries, all beautifully complemented by a dusting of chocolate shavings. Perfect for any celebration, this classic treat is the perfect balance of rich, creamy, and fruity flavors that will leave you craving more.

info.name: Chocolate Truffle Cake
info.description: Indulge in the rich decadence of our Chocolate Truffle Cake—layers of moist chocolate sponge enveloped in silky smooth chocolate ganache. Each bite melts in your mouth, delivering an irresistible blend of deep cocoa flavor and creamy texture. Perfect for celebrations or simply satisfying your sweet cravings!

info.name: Black Forest Cake
info.description: Classic, rich, and irresistibly delicious – our Black Forest Cake is a timeless treat. Layered with moist chocolate sponge, fresh whipped cream, and juicy cherries, it's finished with chocolate shavings for the perfect touch. Ideal for birthdays, celebrations, or simply indulging your sweet tooth, this cake brings joy in every slice.

info.name: Luxury Truffle Chocolate Cake
info.description: Experience pure indulgence with our Luxury Truffle Chocolate Cake—velvety chocolate sponge layered with rich truffle ganache and finished with an elegant, glossy glaze. Crafted for those who crave sophistication in every bite, it’s the ultimate celebration of chocolate.

info.name: Fudge Brownie Cake
info.description: Decadent and dreamy, our Fudge Brownie Cake is a chocolate lover’s paradise. Rich, gooey brownie layers are fused into a moist cake, topped with luscious fudge for an indulgent finish. Perfectly dense and irresistibly chocolaty, it’s the ultimate treat for birthdays, parties, or satisfying those deep dessert cravings.

info.name: Chocolate Caramel Cake
info.description: Decadent chocolate cake oozing with luscious caramel, a heavenly treat for true dessert connoisseurs. Eggless Cake. Choose from a wide range of add-ons to make your order more creative.

info.name: Velvety Chocolate Truffle Cake
info.description: Indulge your loved ones with our premium truffle cake, crafted with rich, velvety chocolate for a truly luxurious treat. Perfect for birthdays, anniversaries, or any celebration, this freshly baked delight melts in every bite and makes every moment sweeter.

info.name: Cream Drop Chocolate Cake
info.description: Savor the delight of a cream filled chocolate cake, a heavenly confection that combines velvety richness with dreamy creaminess. Eggless cake.

info.name: Truffle Walnut Cake
info.description: Savor the perfect blend of rich chocolate and crunchy walnuts with our Truffle Walnut Cake. Layers of decadent truffle-flavored cake are complemented by the earthy crunch of toasted walnuts, creating an irresistible texture and flavor combination. Finished with a smooth chocolate glaze, this cake is a true delight for any occasion, ideal for chocolate and nut lovers alike.

info.name: KitKat Crunch Cream Cake
info.description: Decadent KitKat crunch cream cake layers of delight within. Eggless cake choose from a wide range of add on to make your order more creative.

info.name: Chocolate Cream Cake
info.description: Velvety chocolate cake meets luscious cream, a harmonious union of flavours and textures that creates pure dessert bliss. Eggless cake.

info.name: Rose Paradise Chocolate Cake
info.description: Delight in the beauty and flavor of our Rose Paradise Chocolate Cake! This rich, moist chocolate cake is topped with a delicate floral design made from silky whipped cream, adding an elegant touch to every slice. The perfect balance of rich chocolate and light, airy cream makes it an indulgent yet refined treat. Ideal for special occasions, this cake is sure to charm and satisfy with its perfect combination of beauty and taste!

info.name: Butterscotch Cake
info.description: Experience the delightful crunch of butterscotch in a delectable cake, a perfect blend of sweetness and texture. Eggless Cake. Choose from a wide range of add-ons to make your order more creative.

info.name: Red Velvet Cake
info.description: Indulge in elegance with our Red Velvet Cake – a rich, velvety delight with a hint of cocoa, layered with smooth cream cheese frosting. Its vibrant red hue and melt-in-your-mouth texture make it a showstopper for any celebration. Perfect for birthdays, anniversaries, or sweet surprises, this cake is love at first bite.

info.name: Swirls Of Sweetness Butterscotch Cake
info.description: Delight in the swirls of sweet butterscotch, a divine cake that brings pure joy and irresistible sweetness to every piece of cake.

info.name: Blueberry Glaze Cake
info.description: Delight in the perfect balance of sweetness and tang with our Blueberry Glaze Cake. Featuring a soft, moist cake base topped with a glossy, fresh blueberry glaze, each bite is bursting with fruity goodness. Ideal for those who crave a light yet indulgent treat, this cake is perfect for any occasion that calls for something extraordinary.

info.name: Pineapple Cake
info.description: Refresh your senses with our Pineapple Cake! This moist, soft cake is topped with a smooth layer of sweet pineapple crush, offering a deliciously fruity and refreshing flavor in every bite. The creamy frosting enhances the tropical taste, making it a perfect balance of sweetness and lightness. Ideal for any occasion, this cake brings a delightful burst of tropical goodness to your celebrations!

info.name: Golden Butterscotch Cake
info.description: Delight your loved ones with our premium butterscotch cake, topped with a vibrant cherry. Rich, buttery flavour and crunchy butterscotch bits make every bite indulgent—perfect for birthdays, anniversaries, or any special occasion.

info.name: Truffle Bento Cake (250 gm)
info.description: Truffle Bento Cake of 250 gms - Decadent truffle infused delight, compactly packaged in a unique bento cake. Eggless cake choose from a wide range of add on to make your order more creative.

info.name: Black Forest Bento Cake (250 gm)
info.description: Black Forest Bento Cake 250 gms - Chocolate, layers, and cream unite in a divine. Eggless Cake Choose from a wide range of add-ons to make your order more creative.

info.name: Butterscotch Cream Delight Bento (250 gm)
info.description: Delight your loved ones with this elegant butterscotch cream cake, featuring smooth white frosting with hand-painted floral strokes and golden accents. Each bite combines rich butterscotch crunch with light cream, making it perfect for birthdays, anniversaries, or any sweet celebration.

info.name: Red Velvet Bento Cake (250 gm)
info.description: Red velvet bento cream cake of 250 gms - A symphony of flavours where layers of cocoa intertwine with creamy perfection. Crafted for 2-3 people to relish, it's a heartfelt gift. Share the joy of taste that brings a moment of indulgence to any occasion.

info.name: Pink Carnations Bouquet
info.description: Soft and elegant, our Pink Carnations Bouquet is a beautiful expression of love and gratitude. With fresh, hand-selected pink carnations arranged thoughtfully, this bouquet is ideal for birthdays, anniversaries, or to brighten someone's day. Wrapped with care for a stunning presentation.

info.name: Pink Roses Bouquet
info.description: Delicate and charming, our Pink Roses Bouquet is a symbol of grace and affection. Hand-selected fresh pink roses are artfully arranged to convey heartfelt emotions, making it perfect for birthdays, thank-yous, or simply brightening someone’s day. Elegantly wrapped for a beautiful presentation.

info.name: Blue Orchids Bouquet
info.description: Exquisite and captivating, our Blue Orchids Bouquet is a true symbol of rarity and elegance. With vibrant, hand-selected blue orchids, this arrangement makes a stunning gift for any special occasion or to add a touch of uniqueness to your space. Thoughtfully arranged and beautifully wrapped for a memorable presentation.

info.name: Red Roses Bouquet
info.description: Express love and admiration with our stunning Red Roses Bouquet. Featuring fresh, hand-picked red roses, this elegant arrangement is perfect for romantic gestures, anniversaries, or simply saying "I love you." Beautifully wrapped and ready to impress.

info.name: Purple Orchids Bouquet
info.description: Graceful and exotic, our Purple Orchids Bouquet radiates beauty and elegance. Featuring stunning, hand-picked purple orchids, this arrangement is perfect for special occasions, celebrations, or as a unique gift to show appreciation. Expertly arranged and elegantly wrapped for a luxurious touch.

info.name: 10 Colourful Roses
info.description: Bright and vibrant, our Mixed Roses Bouquet brings together an array of stunning roses in various colors, symbolizing love, joy, and admiration. Each fresh bloom is carefully arranged to create a colorful, elegant display perfect for birthdays, anniversaries, or any celebration. Wrapped with care for a beautiful presentation.

info.name: 16 Pink Roses Arrangement
info.description: Our Pink Roses Arrangement is a charming display of 16 fresh pink roses, thoughtfully arranged in a rustic wooden basket. This elegant and timeless bouquet is perfect for expressing love, appreciation, or celebrating special moments. With its warm, natural feel, it adds a touch of beauty and grace to any occasion.

info.name: 9 Red Roses In Love You Sticker Vase
info.description: Celebrate love with our "Love You" Sticker Vase featuring 9 stunning red roses. Each fresh bloom is elegantly arranged in a sleek glass vase, adorned with a sweet "Love You" sticker for a personal touch. Perfect for anniversaries, romantic gestures, or simply expressing your affection. A beautiful and thoughtful gift that speaks from the heart.

info.name: Carnation Birthday Wishes Sleeve
info.description: Premium, unscented baby pink carnations of 4 Pcs with white fillers in FNP grey 'Happy Birthday' print sleeve bag

info.name: Magic Of Love Red Rose Sleeve
info.description: 4 Red roses in black 'Love you more' sleeve bag

info.name: Confess Your Love Roses Arrangement
info.description: 2 Pink rose & 2 Red rose with green colour ping pong leaf filler in FNP Black Love you more print sleeve bag

info.name: Blushing Single Pink Rose
info.description: A delicate single pink rose bouquet, beautifully complemented by fresh green Morpankhi leaf filler. Wrapped in soft off-white and blush pink non-woven paper for a subtle, elegant touch, and tied gracefully with a white raffia bow. A simple yet thoughtful expression of love, admiration, or appreciation.

info.name: Exotic Single Red Rose
info.description: This bouquet symbolises love and happiness. A red rose represents joy and love, accompanied by green morpankhi leaf fillers for growth. Wrapped in a yellow non-woven packing sheet, it exudes cheerfulness, while the white raffia knot adds purity. With a green message card, its a heartfelt gift for any occasion.

info.name: Elegant Single White Rose
info.description: Embrace purity and new beginnings with this beautiful bouquet. A white rose, symbolising innocence and love, stands among green morpankhi leaf fillers. Adorned with a sky blue wrapping paper and a delicate white raffia knot, it exudes elegance. A perfect gift for any occasion, conveying heartfelt emotions.

info.name: Joyful Single Yellow Rose
info.description: This bouquet symbolises love and happiness. A yellow rose represents joy and friendship, accompanied by green morpankhi leaf fillers for growth. Wrapped in a yellow non-woven packing sheet, it exudes cheerfulness, while the white raffia knot adds purity. With a green message card, its a heartfelt gift for any occasion.

info.name: Lively Jade Plant
info.description: Add a touch of vitality with the Lively Jade Plant! With its thick, glossy leaves and vibrant green color, this succulent is a symbol of prosperity and good fortune. Easy to care for and drought-tolerant, it thrives in both homes and offices. Perfect for those seeking a low-maintenance, stylish addition to their space while boosting air quality.

info.name: Golden Money Plant
info.description: Bring luck and freshness home with the Golden Money Plant! Known for its vibrant golden-green leaves, this air-purifying plant enhances indoor décor while removing toxins from the air. Easy to grow and maintain, it's perfect for desks, shelves, or hanging planters—adding natural charm and positive energy to any space.

info.name: Decorated Truffle Ensemble
info.description: Delight your loved one with our Decorated Truffle Ensemble — a romantic combo featuring 9 fresh red roses beautifully arranged in a glass vase with a heartfelt "Love You" sticker, paired with a half kg of rich, decorated chocolate truffle cake. Perfect for anniversaries, birthdays, or any special occasion where love and indulgence come together.

info.name: Orchid Truffle Elegance
info.description: Grace meets indulgence in our Orchid Truffle Elegance ensemble. Featuring a stunning bouquet of 4 exquisite purple orchids and a beautifully decorated chocolate truffle cake, this gift set is perfect for sophisticated celebrations, heartfelt gestures, or simply treating someone special. A refined blend of beauty and flavor that leaves a lasting impression.

info.name: Rose Cake Ensemble
info.description: Elegance and indulgence come together in the Rose Cake Ensemble. This beautiful set includes 16 soft pink roses arranged in a charming wooden basket, paired with a delightful Rose Paradise chocolate cake. The perfect gift for any celebration, this ensemble radiates love, sweetness, and luxury in every detail.

info.name: Blissful Elegance
info.description: Celebrate moments with grace through our Blissful Elegance ensemble. Featuring a delicate bouquet of 8 fresh pink roses and a rich Cream Drop Chocolate Cake, this set blends beauty and indulgence perfectly. Ideal for birthdays, anniversaries, or heartfelt surprises, it’s a sweet and elegant way to show you care.

info.name: Rose Cake Gift Ensemble
info.description: Delight someone special with our Rose Cake Gift Ensemble. This charming set includes a bouquet of 12 fresh pink roses, a luscious Rose Paradise Chocolate cake. Perfect for birthdays, anniversaries, or heartfelt celebrations, it's a sweet and elegant way to show you care.

info.name: Blueberry Cascade Ensemble
info.description: Celebrate in style with the Blueberry Cascade Ensemble. This vibrant set features a bouquet of 10 fresh red roses, paired with a delectable blueberry cake. Whether it’s a birthday, anniversary, or any special moment, this thoughtful ensemble combines sweetness, beauty, and a personal touch to create the perfect gift.

info.name: Love & Chocolate Overload
info.description: Indulge in passion and decadence with our Love & Chocolate Overload ensemble. This irresistible gift set features a bouquet of 8 vibrant red roses paired with a rich and indulgent Death by Chocolate cake. Perfect for romantic celebrations, anniversaries, or any moment you want to make unforgettable with love and chocolate.

info.name: Kitkat Crunch Symphony Ensemble
info.description: Delight in a perfect blend of beauty and flavor with the Kitkat Crunch Symphony Ensemble. This charming gift set includes 10 stunning red roses, symbolizing love and passion, paired with a rich, crunchy Kitkat Crunch Cake. A delightful treat for any occasion, this ensemble is sure to make hearts melt and taste buds dance.

info.name: Red Velvet Bliss
info.description: Indulge in love and sweetness with our Red Velvet Bliss ensemble. Featuring a vibrant bouquet of 8 fresh red carnations and a delightful 250g red velvet bento cake, this gift set is perfect for intimate celebrations, romantic gestures, or simply brightening someone’s day. A charming way to express heartfelt emotions with elegance and taste.

info.name: Rose Cake Delight Ensemble
info.description: Make birthdays extra special with the Rose Cake Delight Ensemble. This charming set features 4 soft pink carnations elegantly arranged in a stylish grey birthday sleeve bag, paired with a delectable Rose Paradise cake. A perfect blend of beauty and sweetness to celebrate someone truly special.

info.name: Pure Delight Elegance
info.description: Surprise someone special with the elegant pairing of a single, beautiful rose and a jar of rich chocolate truffles. This thoughtful gift combines the simple charm of a fresh rose with the decadent pleasure of gourmet truffles, each bite a velvety delight. Perfect for any occasion that calls for a touch of romance and indulgence.

info.name: Blue Bliss Combo
info.description: Gift a touch of elegance with this serene combo featuring a stunning single blue orchid and a luscious blueberry jar. This unique pairing brings together the exotic beauty of orchids with the sweet tang of blueberries, making it a delightful treat for any occasion.

info.name: Red Romance Delight
info.description: Express your love with this charming combo of a classic single red rose, symbolising deep romance, paired with a decadent black forest jar. A perfect little surprise to sweeten special moments and say I love you in the most delicious way.

info.name: Velvet Blush Rose Jar
info.description: A thoughtful gift featuring a single pink rose paired with a jar of decadent red velvet spread, perfect for adding a touch of elegance and sweetness to any occasion.

info.name: Sunny Sweetness Charm
info.description: This elegant gift features a single beautiful rose paired with a jar of creamy butterscotch truffles, blending timeless beauty with sweet indulgence, perfect for any special occasion.

info.name: Birthday Topper
info.description: Celebrate in style with our elegant Happy Birthday Topper! Perfect for cakes, it adds a festive touch to any birthday. Reusable, lightweight, and eye-catching—make your party unforgettable!

info.name: Anniversary Topper
info.description: Add a touch of romance with our Happy Anniversary Topper! Perfect for cakes, it's elegant, reusable, and ideal for celebrating love and milestones in style.

info.name: Magic Relighting Candle
info.description: The Magic Relight Candle reignites after being blown out, adding surprise and fun to any celebration — perfect for birthdays and party tricks!

info.name: Heart Topper
info.description: Show your love with our charming Heart Topper! Ideal for cakes, cupcakes, or gifts, it adds a sweet and romantic touch to any celebration or special moment.

info.name: Mr&Mrs Topper
info.description: Celebrate the happy couple with our elegant Mr&Mrs Topper! Perfect for weddings, anniversaries, or bridal showers, it adds a classy and romantic touch to any cake.

info.name: Best Wishes Topper
info.description: Send warm regards with our stylish Best Wishes Topper! Ideal for farewells, graduations, or any special occasion, it adds a heartfelt and elegant finish to your cake.

info.name: Birthday Greeting Card
info.description: Celebrate their special day with this charming birthday card, featuring a heartfelt message and vibrant design—perfect for spreading joy and smiles on their big day!

info.name: Multi Coloured Deflated Balloons Set of 50
info.description: Brighten any celebration with this set of 50 multi-coloured deflated balloons — perfect for parties, decorations, and fun-filled events!

info.name: Anniversary Greeting Card
info.description: Celebrate lasting love with this elegant anniversary card, featuring a heartfelt message and beautiful design—perfect for honoring your special bond and memorable moments together.

info.name: Best Wishes Greeting Card
info.description: Send your warmest wishes with this thoughtful best wishes card, designed to brighten any occasion and show you care with a heartfelt message.

info.name: Chocolate Truffle Jar [Set of 2]
info.description: Indulge in pure chocolate bliss with our Chocolate Truffle Jar! This decadent dessert layers rich, velvety chocolate cake with a creamy, smooth chocolate truffle filling. Topped with a generous swirl of chocolate ganache and a sprinkle of chocolate shavings, each spoonful offers a luxurious, melt-in-your-mouth experience. Conveniently packed in a jar, it’s the perfect treat for chocolate lovers and ideal for on-the-go enjoyment or as a thoughtful gift for any occasion!

info.name: Choco Chip Jar [Set of 2]
info.description: Treat yourself to the ultimate chocolate indulgence with our Choco Chip Jar! This delicious dessert features layers of soft, moist cake filled with rich, melty chocolate chips, all topped with smooth whipped cream. Each spoonful offers a perfect balance of chocolatey goodness and creamy texture, making it the ideal treat for any occasion. Conveniently packed in a jar, it’s perfect for on-the-go enjoyment or as a sweet gift to share with loved ones!

info.name: Red Velvet Jar [Set of 2]
info.description: Indulge in the luxurious taste of our Red Velvet Jar! This delightful dessert features layers of moist, velvety red velvet cake, perfectly paired with smooth cream cheese frosting. Conveniently packed in a jar, each spoonful offers the perfect balance of tangy and sweet, with the rich flavor of red velvet shining through. Ideal for on-the-go enjoyment or as a special gift, this jar is a delicious and elegant treat for any occasion!

info.name: Butterscotch Jar [Set of 2]
info.description: Treat yourself to the sweet and indulgent layers of our Butterscotch Jar! This delightful dessert combines soft, moist cake with rich butterscotch syrup, all topped with smooth whipped cream. The perfect balance of creamy, sweet, and slightly caramelized flavors, each spoonful offers a comforting, melt-in-your-mouth experience. Conveniently packed in a jar, it’s perfect for on-the-go enjoyment or as a sweet gift for any occasion!

info.name: Black Forest Jar [Set of 2]
info.description: Enjoy the classic, indulgent flavor of our Black Forest Jar! This delightful dessert features layers of moist chocolate cake, rich whipped cream, and sweet cherry compote, all layered together in a convenient jar. Each spoonful offers the perfect balance of chocolatey goodness, creamy richness, and fruity freshness. Ideal for on-the-go indulgence or as a special gift, this jar brings the beloved Black Forest flavors in a fun, portable form!

info.name: Blueberry Jar [Set of 2]
info.description: Indulge in the refreshing sweetness of our Blueberry Jar! This delightful dessert layers soft, moist cake with a luscious blueberry compote and smooth whipped cream, creating the perfect balance of fruity, creamy, and slightly tangy flavors. Each spoonful is a burst of delicious blueberry goodness, all conveniently packed in a jar for a portable and indulgent treat. Ideal for on-the-go enjoyment or as a thoughtful gift, this jar is sure to satisfy your sweet cravings!

info.name: Chocolate Truffle Jar
info.description: Indulge in pure chocolate bliss with our Chocolate Truffle Jar! This decadent dessert layers rich, velvety chocolate cake with a creamy, smooth chocolate truffle filling. Topped with a generous swirl of chocolate ganache and a sprinkle of chocolate shavings, each spoonful offers a luxurious, melt-in-your-mouth experience. Conveniently packed in a jar, it’s the perfect treat for chocolate lovers and ideal for on-the-go enjoyment or as a thoughtful gift for any occasion!

info.name: Black Forest Jar
info.description: Enjoy the classic, indulgent flavor of our Black Forest Jar! This delightful dessert features layers of moist chocolate cake, rich whipped cream, and sweet cherry compote, all layered together in a convenient jar. Each spoonful offers the perfect balance of chocolatey goodness, creamy richness, and fruity freshness. Ideal for on-the-go indulgence or as a special gift, this jar brings the beloved Black Forest flavors in a fun, portable form!

info.description: Treat yourself to the ultimate chocolate indulgence with our Choco Chip Jar! This delicious dessert features layers of soft, moist cake filled with rich, melty chocolate chips, all topped with smooth whipped cream. Each spoonful offers a perfect balance of chocolatey goodness and creamy texture, making it the ideal treat for any occasion. Conveniently packed in a jar, it’s perfect for on-the-go enjoyment or as a sweet gift to share with loved ones!

info.name: Blueberry Jar
info.description: Indulge in the refreshing sweetness of our Blueberry Jar! This delightful dessert layers soft, moist cake with a luscious blueberry compote and smooth whipped cream, creating the perfect balance of fruity, creamy, and slightly tangy flavors. Each spoonful is a burst of delicious blueberry goodness, all conveniently packed in a jar for a portable and indulgent treat. Ideal for on-the-go enjoyment or as a thoughtful gift, this jar is sure to satisfy your sweet cravings!

info.name: Red Velvet Jar
info.description: Indulge in the luxurious taste of our Red Velvet Jar! This delightful dessert features layers of moist, velvety red velvet cake, perfectly paired with smooth cream cheese frosting. Conveniently packed in a jar, each spoonful offers the perfect balance of tangy and sweet, with the rich flavor of red velvet shining through. Ideal for on-the-go enjoyment or as a special gift, this jar is a delicious and elegant treat for any occasion!

info.name: Butterscotch Jar
info.description: Treat yourself to the sweet and indulgent layers of our Butterscotch Jar! This delightful dessert combines soft, moist cake with rich butterscotch syrup, all topped with smooth whipped cream. The perfect balance of creamy, sweet, and slightly caramelized flavors, each spoonful offers a comforting, melt-in-your-mouth experience. Conveniently packed in a jar, it’s perfect for on-the-go enjoyment or as a sweet gift for any occasion!

info.name: Chocolate Truffle Pastry [Set of 2]
info.description: Treat yourself to a luxurious chocolate truffle pastry, featuring rich chocolate layers and a velvety truffle filling, topped with smooth ganache!

info.name: Pineapple Pastry [Set of 2]
info.description: Enjoy a refreshing pineapple pastry with soft sponge cake, sweet pineapple filling, and a creamy topping, offering a perfect blend of tropical flavors!

info.name: Butterscotch Pastry [Set of 2]
info.description: Delight in the rich flavors of soft sponge cake, creamy butterscotch frosting, and crunchy caramel bits for the perfect sweet treat!

info.name: Black Forest Pastry [Set of 2]
info.description: Classic Black Forest pastry with layers of moist chocolate sponge, whipped cream, and juicy cherries, topped with chocolate shavings for a timeless treat!

info.name: Red Velvet Pastry [Set of 2]
info.description: Savor the elegance of a red velvet pastry, with moist red velvet cake layers, smooth cream cheese frosting, and a touch of indulgence in every bite!

info.name: Chocolate Cream Pastry [Set of 2]
info.description: Indulge in the richness of soft chocolate sponge layered with creamy chocolate frosting, creating a heavenly chocolate cream pastry!

info.name: Chocolate Truffle & Black Forest Pastry
info.description: Indulge in the ultimate duo with our Chocolate Truffle & Black Forest Pastry combo! Enjoy the rich, velvety chocolate truffle layers paired with the classic Black Forest’s chocolate sponge, whipped cream, and cherries for a decadent experience!

info.name: Black Forest & Chocolate Cream Pastry
info.description: Double the indulgence with a Black Forest & Chocolate Cream Pastry combo! Enjoy the rich layers of chocolate sponge, creamy frosting, and cherries in Black Forest, paired with the smooth, decadent chocolate cream pastry for the ultimate sweet treat!

info.name: Butterscotch & Red Velvet Pastry
info.description: Delight in the perfect pairing of Butterscotch & Red Velvet Pastry combo! Savor the creamy butterscotch frosting and crunchy caramel bits alongside the rich red velvet layers and smooth cream cheese frosting for an irresistible treat!

info.name: Chocolate Truffle & Pineapple Pastry
info.description: Treat yourself to the perfect balance of indulgence and freshness with our Chocolate Truffle & Pineapple Pastry combo. Enjoy the rich, velvety chocolate truffle layers paired with the light, tropical sweetness of pineapple, creating a delightful contrast in every bite!
